topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Primary cleanser that removes impurities without any stripping

topIngredients.name: Aloe Barbadensis
topIngredients.benefit: Instantly soothes and calms skin after cleansing

topIngredients.name: Marula Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Luxury oil that prevents moisture loss and leaves skin soft

verdict: Drunk Elephant Beste No.9 takes a minimalist approach to cleansing with a glycerin-forward formula. Free of fragrance, essential oils, and silicones. The most skin-kind luxury cleanser for compromised or reactive skin.
